## Governance Declaration

- Security review inventory impact:
  - `Yes` or `No`
- Review or assessment artifact updated:
  - link or `N/A`
- Owner-repo follow-up required:
  - `Yes` or `No`
- Owner-repo follow-up link:
  - link or `N/A`

If no follow-up is required, explain why briefly.
